import React from "react"; const stats = [ { label: "Total Users", value: 1240, icon: "👤", color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700" }, { label: "Orders Today", value: 87, icon: "🛒", color: "bg-green-100 text-green-700" }, { label: "Revenue", value: "$12,340", icon: "💰", color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700" }, { label: "Products", value: 320, icon: "📦", color: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700" }, ]; export default function AdminDashboard() { return (

Dashboard

{stat.icon}
{stat.value}
{stat.label}
))}
